parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { chat_id: $env.OPS_CHAT_ID, text: $json.ops_message, disable_web_page_preview: true, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [ [ { text: 'APPROVE', callback_data: $json.cb_approve }, { text: 'EDIT', callback_data: $json.cb_edit } ], [ { text: 'SKIP', callback_data: $json.cb_skip }, { text: 'DNC', callback_data: $json.cb_dnc } ] ] } } }}
